buildCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r frontend/dist/* dist/; elif [ -f ../frontend/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix ../frontend && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r ../frontend/dist/* dist/; else echo 'frontend package.json not found' && exit 1; fi
